rationale: The cited paper is used in the core theory section to support the choice of the motivation-ability-opportunity (MAO) framework. The citing authors explicitly state they build on MAO and cite Wang, Gupta, and Grewal (2017) as recent marketing evidence of MAO use for information processing and social capital utilization. Although they do not reuse the cited paper's empirical setting or network measures, the citation meaningfully informs the conceptual framing of their mechanism.
relation_description: The citing paper uses Wang et al. (2017) as a prior marketing application of MAO logic and applies that framework to explain how short sellers process customer (dis)satisfaction information and affect abnormal returns.
